# BenzHub

> BenzHub is a multilingual technical blog covering Python, JavaScript, Linux, Web development, and more. Content is available in Traditional Chinese, English, and Simplified Chinese.

## Python

- [Python Tutorials](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/python/): Python fundamentals to advanced topics including data types, functions, OOP, and best practices

## JavaScript

- [JavaScript Tutorials](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/javascript/): Complete JavaScript learning path from basics to advanced concepts like closures, async/await, and DOM manipulation

## Linux

- [Linux Tutorials](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/linux/): Linux system administration, shell scripting, processes, permissions, SSH, and networking
- [Linux (English)](https://benzhub.github.io/en/categories/linux/): English version of Linux tutorials

## Web Development

- [HTML & CSS](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/html-css/): Frontend fundamentals including layout, responsive design, and CSS techniques
- [React](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/react/): React framework tutorials and patterns

## DevOps & Tools

- [Git](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/git/): Version control with Git from basics to advanced workflows
- [Django](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/django/): Django web framework development

## Networking

- [Networking](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/networking/): Network fundamentals including IP, subnets, HTTP/2, DNS, and protocols

## Software Design

- [Design Patterns](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/categories/design-pattern/): Software design patterns and principles

## Optional

- [About](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/about/): About the author BenZ
- [Contact](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/contact/): Contact information
- [Resources](https://benzhub.github.io/zh-tw/resourses/): Learning resources
